"""
Select the 'Split islands to segments' option within the Islands effect
in the Segment Editor module.

This activates the Islands effect and sets its operation to
SPLIT_ISLANDS_TO_SEGMENTS (value "SPLIT_ISLANDS_TO_SEGMENTS"),
which will create a new segment for each island of the selected segment.
"""

import slicer

# Get the segment editor widget
segmentEditorWidget = slicer.modules.segmenteditor.widgetRepresentation().self().editor

# Get the "Islands" effect by name
islandsEffect = segmentEditorWidget.effectByName("Islands")
if islandsEffect is None:
    raise RuntimeError("Islands effect not found. Make sure the Segment Editor is initialized and the effect is registered.")

# Activate the Islands effect
segmentEditorWidget.setActiveEffect(islandsEffect)

# Set the operation to "Split islands to segments"
islandsEffect.setParameter("Operation", "SPLIT_ISLANDS_TO_SEGMENTS")

# Set the minimum size parameter (default from the effect is 1000 voxels).
# This is relevant because SPLIT_ISLANDS_TO_SEGMENTS uses MinimumSize to
# filter out islands smaller than the specified number of voxels.
islandsEffect.setParameter("MinimumSize", "1000")

# Read back the parameter to verify it was applied
appliedOperation = islandsEffect.parameter("Operation")
if appliedOperation != "SPLIT_ISLANDS_TO_SEGMENTS":
    raise RuntimeError("STATE_NOT_APPLIED: Islands effect Operation parameter")
